title: Block ALL BULL (C) entries 10:00-11:30 ET AND >=14:00 ET (Aggressive account)
hypothesis: IS MORNING bulls (10:00-11:30 ET): n=47, WR=14.9%, total=-$222 — structurally weak at ITM-2. IS AFTERNOON bulls (14:00-15:00 ET): n=6, WR=0%, total=-$82 (all losses/breakevens). IS POWER_HOUR bulls (>=15:00): n=3, WR=33%, total=-$45 (aligns with live entry_no_trade_after_et=15:00). Bulls in all these windows drain P&L without meaningful signal. OOS MORNING: 2 trades (2026-05-26 +$0, 2026-05-28 -$40). OOS POWER_HOUR: 1 trade (2026-05-27 15:05 -$42).
method: 4-way A/B (baseline IS/OOS vs candidate IS/OOS, orchestrator full run with cascade). Extended from 14:00-15:00 to >=14:00 (adds POWER_HOUR). Re-run confirmed all 5 OP-22 gates still pass with better margins.

G1_IS_delta_ge_0.note: Cascade-adjusted: 40 fewer trades net (47 MORNING + 6 AFTERNOON + 3 POWER_HOUR post-hoc = 56 blocked; cascade-in adds 16 replacement trades). IS P&L improves +$384.

G2_OOS_delta_gt_0.note: 3 OOS bulls removed: 2026-05-26 10:40 level_reclaim +$0, 2026-05-28 10:15 conf+lvl_rec+ribbon -$40, 2026-05-27 15:05 level_reclaim -$42.

detail.note: Cascade: MORNING winners in Jan-Feb 2025 blocked; replacements are losers

G5_anchor_no_regression.note: All 3 anchor dates (2026-04-29, 2026-05-01, 2026-05-04) are PUT/BEAR trades. Gate only affects BULL (C) entries. Anchor P&L unchanged: 4/29=+$0, 5/01=+$34, 5/04=+$0.

IS_power_hour_bulls_blocked.note: Aligns backtest with live entry_no_trade_after_et=15:00 in aggressive/params.json

caveats: SW1 (Jan-May 2025) cascade: gate blocks some MORNING winners in early 2025. Replacement cascade trades are losers, so SW1 delta=-$126. G4 allows 1 fail.
Gate is broad: blocks ALL BULL entries in windows, including some rare morning wins. The cost is acceptable given low base WR (14.9%/0%/33%).
POWER_HOUR extension (>=15:00) adds IS_delta=+$45 and OOS_delta=+$42 vs the original 14:00-15:00 gate. Primarily a backtest/live alignment fix.
Bulls in OPEN_DRIVE (09:35-10:00) and MIDDAY (11:30-14:00) are unaffected. MIDDAY IS bulls have positive P&L and are not touched.
MORNING IS bears (WR=56.2%, +$1,090) are explicitly excluded — gate is BULL-only.
Cascade-adjusted: 40 net trades removed vs 56 post-hoc (16 cascade-in trades absorbed by freed quality slots).

implementation.gate_windows: 10:00-11:30 ET (MORNING) AND >=14:00 ET (AFTERNOON + POWER_HOUR), BULL (C) entries only
